title: Aircraft maintenance and related trades
description: Perform engineering duties in designing, constructing, and testing aircraft, missiles, and spacecraft. May conduct basic and applied research to evaluate adaptability of materials and equipment to aircraft design and manufacture. May recommend improvements in testing equipment and techniques. Apply knowledge of engineering technology and biological science to agricultural problems concerned with power and machinery, electrification, structures, soil and water conservation, and processing of agricultural products. Design, develop, and evaluate the operation of marine vessels, ship machinery, and related equipment, such as power supply and propulsion systems. (Based on 22 related US occupations.)

tasks.task: Read and interpret pilots' descriptions of problems to diagnose causes.
Disassemble machines to examine parts, such as wires, gears, or bearings for wear or defects, using hand or power tools and measuring devices.
Install appliances such as refrigerators, washing machines, and stoves, including connecting hoses to water pipes.
Inspect and test operation, mechanical parts, and circuitry of gate crossings, signals, and signal equipment such as interlocks and detectors.
Test and examine gas pipelines and equipment to locate leaks and faulty connections and determine gas pressure and flow.
Talk to customers or refer to work orders to establish the nature of appliance malfunctions and provide cost estimates for repairs.
Clean, lubricate, and adjust mechanical parts to maintain machines' operating efficiency and prevent breakdowns.
Repair or replace defective wiring, broken lenses, or burned-out light bulbs and inspect electrical units for defects.
Operate machines to test the functioning of parts or mechanisms, including running new speaker and electrical cables.
Record maintenance and repair work performed on appliances and maintain logs detailing tests, repairs, and maintenance.
Consult manuals, schematics, and engineering personnel to troubleshoot equipment problems and determine optimal functioning.
Calibrate testing instruments.
Analyze equipment performance records to assess functioning and maintain service records.
Inspect and test electrical systems and equipment to locate and diagnose malfunctions.
Install fixtures, outlets, switches, and wall boxes using hand tools.
Repair or rebuild equipment, such as starters and generators, using electrician's tools.
Measure, cut, and install frameworks and conduit for wiring and control panels.
Reassemble and test equipment after repairs while referring to schematics and specifications.
Adjust, repair, or replace defective wiring, relays, fuses, and electrical components as needed.
Collaborate with engineers to resolve issues and develop modifications to designs based on customer needs.
Conduct environmental and performance tests on marine equipment, analyzing data for compliance and operational effectiveness.
Prepare detailed drawings, specifications, and reports for engineering projects related to aircraft and aerospace design.
Investigate and diagnose equipment failures, providing recommendations for modifications or repairs to improve performance.
Design and supervise environmental projects in agriculture, including water management and energy efficiency systems.
Evaluate and approve vendor selection by analyzing performance and proposals.
Develop or implement operating methods or procedures for engineering projects, ensuring compliance and efficiency.
Provide technical direction and support to engineering personnel on aerospace projects, ensuring project alignment with specifications.
Simulate or model fuel cell systems using simulation software programs and recommend or implement design changes.
Provide technical consultation related to the development of fuel cell systems and define integration challenges for fuel cell vehicles.
Plan or conduct experiments to validate new materials or optimize protocols to improve system performance.
Integrate electric drive subsystems with vehicle systems to optimize performance or mitigate faults, while monitoring work areas for safety.
Inspect work areas, tools, and equipment, verify completed work using gauges, and conduct employee safety training.
Develop and implement maintenance policies and procedures, while monitoring tool and part inventories to ensure adequate conditions.
Examine systems and analyze information to determine needed installations or repairs, and meet with vendors about products for repairs.
Perform skilled repair or maintenance operations using hand or power tools, and recommend personnel actions like promotions or hires.
Confer with management and personnel to coordinate work activities, resolve grievances, and establish work schedules.
Counsel employees about work issues, assist with skill deficiencies, and develop electronic maintenance programs for efficient operations.
Investigate accidents or injuries and prepare reports of findings related to workplace incidents.

emerging_tasks.task: Perform installation, testing, adjustment, and repair of avionics equipment in uncrewed aerial vehicles, such as drones.
Use drones for inspection of high-voltage lines and other hard-to-reach equipment.
Communicate results in peer-reviewed research articles or at workshops or conferences.
Develop and test autonomous systems for uncrewed aerospace vehicles.
Develop plans for safely drydocking vessels, including structural integrity, block loading, and stability.
Investigate equipment failures or diagnose faulty operations and recommend or perform remedial actions.
Use agricultural drones for crop monitoring, irrigation management, and pest control.
